'''Lanah Malo''' was a member of the [[Corellian Resistance/Legends|Corellian Resistance]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
She accompanied her friend, [[Bria Tharen]] on a mission to [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] to make contact with the local resistance and to assassinate the [[t'landa Til]] priest, [[Veratil]], who was conducting a revival there to recruit pilgrims to work as slaves in the spice processing factories of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. The plan failed when Veratil caught sight of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the crowd and alerted his guards.

She later disappeared when the Empire raided a resistance meeting on Corellia's eastern continent.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
